chunks.text: A Bestie apology to Phil Hellmuth, All-In Poker Tournament
Trump's majorly consequential Middle East trip: Saudi, Qatar, Iran, and his vision for a "New Middle East"
US-China deal: is the tide turning on tariffs?
GOP divided over "Big, Beautiful Bill" due to its impact on our debt spiral
Science Corner: Montana bans cell-based meat, joining Florida and others

Trump's EO on pharma prices: role of PBMs, is this too much government intervention?
